sql:
/* 
====================================================================
Title: Monthly Reward Redemption Breakdown
Description: 
Calculates the total number of items redeemed and the total points spent 
for each reward type during a specific month. Excludes pointable_id 9.
Used for Slide 9 (Redeem By Items) and Slide 10 (Redeem By Points).
====================================================================

Example Output:
reward                         | total_items | total_redeem
ผลิตภัณฑ์ทิวลิป                   | 680         | 17000
True Money Gift Card 100 บาท   | 74          | 1480
====================================================================
*/

with tp as (
select 
	cast(point_id as bigint) as tpid
	, pointable_id
	, point
from transaction_points tp
where 
	created_at >= '2026-03-01 00:00:00'
	and created_at <= '2026-03-31 23:59:59'
	and pointable_type = 'Reward'
	and pointable_id <> 9
	and deleted_at is null
)

, p as (
select
	cast(user_id as bigint) as uid
	, id
	, point as p_balance
from points
)

select
	admin_name as reward
	, count(p.id) as total_items
	, sum(abs(point)) as total_redeem
from tp
left join rewards r
on tp.pointable_id = r.id
left join p
on p.id = tp.tpid
group by reward
order by total_items desc;
